flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Community College of Baltimore County fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (10.2% → 8.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Baltimore County fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Community College of Baltimore County rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (49.4% → 56.1%).
